steps.voice: Tap any widget to edit its signal, label, colours or thresholds.
The config modal. Three tabs: Data, Presets, Alerts.
Data tab — Display section sets the label and decimals.
Data Source picks the CAN signal. 14 defaults, more with your ECU preset.
Expand CAN Bus Settings for a custom signal — CAN ID, bit position, scale, offset.
Cancel drops changes. Save writes to flash and reloads the layout.
